title: Remove 'A Unit of Bhagyalaxmi Construction' branding; mention only 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' in vendor selection steps

requirements.summary: Remove all occurrences of 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (and its Hindi/Odia equivalents) from every user-facing surface across the application. The standalone name 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (or 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction') must still appear wherever the business name is shown.
acceptanceCriteria: The string 'A unit of' / 'A UNIT OF' no longer appears anywhere in the rendered UI in any language (en/hi/od).
The page title in index.html no longer contains 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'.
The Footer component does not render a unit designation line containing 'a unit of'.
All translation keys (en/hi/od) in translations.ts that contained 'a unit of bhagyalaxmi construction' are updated to remove that sub-phrase.
The business name 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction' continues to appear where it should.

file_operations.description: Update the page title to remove 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' while keeping the business name. Change from 'TRI-GITA SERVICES (A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION)' to a title that includes only 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' or an appropriate variant without the 'a unit of' sub-phrase.

Remove the unit designation line that currently displays 'A Unit of Bhagyalaxmi Construction' or its translation variants. Ensure the business name 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction' still appears in the footer where appropriate, but without the 'a unit of' qualifier. Update the component structure to no longer render the unit designation section.

Remove all translation keys (en/hi/od) that contain 'a unit of bhagyalaxmi construction' or equivalent phrases. This includes updating the footer.unit key (if it exists), any header references, hero section references, and any other translation strings that include this sub-branding phrase. Ensure that standalone references to 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction' remain intact across all three languages.

requirements.summary: In the SchemeInfo component's vendor/installer selection step (Phase 2 of the application process), update the text in all three languages (English, Hindi, Odia) so that it explicitly instructs the user to select 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' as the vendor/empanelled installer.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase 2 vendor selection step in SchemeInfo displays 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (or localised equivalent) as the vendor to select.
No other vendor names appear in the Phase 2 vendor selection step in any language.
The instruction is present and correctly rendered in English, Hindi, and Odia.

file_operations.description: Update the Phase 2 vendor/installer selection step text in the scheme info section for all three languages (en/hi/od). Modify the translation keys under schemeInfo.applicationProcess.steps (step index 1, which is Phase 2) to explicitly instruct users to select 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' as the vendor/empanelled installer. Remove or replace any generic vendor selection language with specific instructions mentioning only 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'.

Review the Phase 2 vendor selection step rendering to ensure it properly displays the updated translation text that explicitly mentions 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'. Verify that the component correctly renders the updated translation keys without adding any additional vendor names or generic language that conflicts with the specific instruction to select 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION'.
